channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Monday, February 16
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 01:32 AM (1.66 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 09:32 AM (-0.443 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: SW 17 mph
